ska1mid_aastar_lbandcompleted

2026-06-22 08:53:32 UTC · 4h 27m 19s · simulation 48m 19s · imaging 3h 37m 26s
SDC1 staged delivery: SKA1-MID AA* L-band (600s, 64ch)
SKA1-MID full array (AA*) L-band observation of SDC1 560-1400 crossed catalog, sources >= 10 µJy with real spectral index. 600s snapshot, 770 MHz bandwidth, 64 channels. Full array delivers the best sensitivity and uv-coverage in a short integration.

Observation & Telescope

TelescopeSKA-MID-AAstar (SKA_OST_ARRAY_CONFIG_2_3_1)
Dish Diameter15.0 m
Antennas144
Beam FoV (FWHM)1.09° (diffraction limit: 1.25 λ/D)
Frequency Range950-1670 MHz
Central Frequency1310 MHz
Channels64 x 11.25 MHz
Total Bandwidth720 MHz
Obs Time600 s
Timesteps75
Integration8 s
Telescope Layout
UV Coverage

Sky Model

Inputs FITS catalog SDC1_560_1400_10uJy.json
